The '''asteroid belts''' of the [[Cardua system/Legends|Cardua system]] were [[Mining/Legends|mined]] by the people of that [[Star system/Legends|system]], who had been subjugated by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="TSC">{{StoryCite|story=The Stele Chronicles|book=Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)}}</ref>
